Branding · Packaging · Advertisement

Vegan Ice Cream —
Promotion & Packaging

A branding and promotional campaign for a vegan ice cream brand — covering advertising visuals and packaging design. The creative direction brings together the playfulness of ice cream culture with the clean, purposeful aesthetic of a plant-based brand, communicating indulgence without compromise.

Project Type

Branding & Advertising

Role

Visual Designer

Scope

Branding Packaging Advertising

01 — Vegan Ice Cream Promotion & Packaging

Playful, plant-based,
and proudly indulgent

Vegan ice cream sits at an interesting intersection — it needs to feel joyful and indulgent like any premium ice cream brand, while also communicating its plant-based credentials clearly and confidently. The design work spans both the promotional campaign and the packaging, ensuring the brand reads consistently from shelf to screen.

The colour palette, typography, and visual language were chosen to feel vibrant and approachable — celebrating the product rather than leading with its dietary positioning.

Design approach: Lead with the pleasure, follow with the values. A vegan brand that looks and feels like a treat first, a conscious choice second — that's the balance the creative direction was built around.

Vegan ice cream promotion and packaging — advertising visuals and brand creative.

The creative brief

"Great food branding makes you want to taste it before you've even read the label. Every design decision here — the colours, the composition, the energy — was made to earn that first impulse."
